exists.purpose: Test whether a boolean episode or anchor-evaluation collection exists.

required_safety_rules: Use relation_destination_entry.entry_status with eq PASS for destination-region entry.
Do not invent operators or catalog refs.
Do not use relation_destination_entry_classification in agent-authored plans.

default_invocation_contract.parameters_rule: Do not put undeclared names here; use recipe.parameters + ParameterRef or inline node TypedValue.

host_runtime_globals.description: Host-owned analysis cadence injected when an authored recipe omits it.
host_runtime_globals.name: analysis_rate_hz

host_runtime_globals.description: Host-owned maximum permitted gap in the analysis stream.
host_runtime_globals.name: maximum_analysis_gap_ms

host_runtime_globals.description: Host-owned tracking-quality floor for outfield players per team.
host_runtime_globals.name: minimum_outfield_players_per_team

recipe_contract.parameter_rule: default_invocation.parameters may only contain names declared in recipe.parameters or host-owned runtime globals. Catalog node parameters must use exact catalog parameter names and may be inline TypedValue objects or ParameterRef objects whose name appears in recipe.parameters.

default_invocation_contract.parameters_rule: Do not put undeclared names here; use recipe.parameters + ParameterRef or inline node TypedValue.

host_runtime_globals.description: Host-owned analysis cadence injected when an authored recipe omits it.
host_runtime_globals.name: analysis_rate_hz

host_runtime_globals.description: Host-owned maximum permitted gap in the analysis stream.
host_runtime_globals.name: maximum_analysis_gap_ms

host_runtime_globals.description: Host-owned tracking-quality floor for outfield players per team.
host_runtime_globals.name: minimum_outfield_players_per_team

recipe_contract.parameter_rule: default_invocation.parameters may only contain names declared in recipe.parameters or host-owned runtime globals. Catalog node parameters must use exact catalog parameter names and may be inline TypedValue objects or ParameterRef objects whose name appears in recipe.parameters.

limitations: Hermes receives this bounded context, not raw match dumps or primitive code.
exists/count_at_least are agent-visible only on anchor_evaluations.

For destination-region ball entry after possession-start corridors, Hermes must use relation_destination_entry.entry_status with eq PASS; relation_destination_entry_classification is trusted-recipe-only.
legacy_m1_parity is allowed only for the frozen approved M1 recipe.
Unsupported concepts must be returned as capability gaps.

operators.name: gt
operators.purpose: Compare a numeric signal to a strict lower numeric threshold.

operators.name: gte
operators.purpose: Compare a numeric signal to a numeric threshold.

operators.name: lte
operators.purpose: Compare a numeric signal to an upper numeric threshold.

operators.name: eq
operators.purpose: Compare a signal to an equal typed value.

operators.name: neq
operators.purpose: Compare a signal to a non-equal typed value.

limitations: UNKNOWN remains UNKNOWN; absence is not converted to FALSE.
operators.name: persists_for
operators.purpose: Promote a boolean frame signal to intervals after minimum duration.

rejected_sources: generic collection counts not indexed by anchor_id

operators.name: exists
operators.purpose: Test whether a boolean episode or anchor-evaluation collection exists.

rejected_sources: generic collection counts not indexed by anchor_id

operators.name: count_at_least
operators.purpose: Count a boolean or entity collection and compare to a count threshold.

primitives.name: possession_segment
primitives.purpose: Identify active-ball possession intervals for the perspective team.

limitations: Uses the observed tracking possession-role stream as the transition source.
Does not infer pressing trigger, transition intent, or tactical phase quality.
primitives.name: transition_anchor

parameters.description: Perspective-team possession boundary to expose.
parameters.name: transition_type

parameters.description: Minimum prior continuous possession by the other team before the transition is PASS.
parameters.name: minimum_prior_possession_seconds

parameters.description: Optional ball-zone filter evaluated at the transition frame.
parameters.name: zone_filter

parameters.description: Boundary buffer that turns near-boundary zone calls into UNKNOWN.
parameters.name: zone_boundary_buffer_m

primitives.purpose: Expose observed possession-change hinges for the perspective team from the tracking possession stream.

limitations: Coarse zones only; not a tactical role or detailed positional-lane taxonomy.
Does not infer team intent, build-up phase quality, or territorial value.
primitives.name: structured_zone

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where ball-zone membership is evaluated.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Coarse attacking-direction-normalized pitch zone.
parameters.name: zone_name

parameters.description: Boundary buffer that turns near-boundary zone calls into UNKNOWN.
parameters.name: zone_boundary_buffer_m

primitives.purpose: Evaluate whether the ball is inside a declared coarse pitch zone at an anchor-relative frame.

limitations: Claims only sampled open-space candidate geometry from observed outfield-player positions at a declared frame.
PASS means at least the frozen number of sampled pitch points satisfy frozen nearest-player distance thresholds.
Does not infer continuous polygons, pitch control, space value, creation, exploitation, player intent, tactical causation, quality, or optimality.
Invalid direction, invalid grid parameters, or insufficient observed player tracking produces UNKNOWN rather than an open/closed-space claim.
primitives.name: space_region_generation

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where sampled open-space geometry is evaluated.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Optional attacking-direction-normalized region in which candidate points are sampled.
parameters.name: zone_scope

parameters.description: Pitch-grid spacing for sampled candidate open-space points.
parameters.name: grid_step_m

parameters.description: Minimum distance from every observed opponent outfielder for a sampled point to count as open.
parameters.name: minimum_opponent_distance_m

parameters.description: Minimum distance from every observed teammate outfielder for a sampled point to count as open.
parameters.name: minimum_teammate_distance_m

parameters.description: Minimum sampled candidate points required for open_space_status PASS.
parameters.name: minimum_open_points

parameters.description: Maximum representative candidate points retained as evidence.
parameters.name: maximum_candidate_points

parameters.description: Minimum observed outfield players for each team before sampled open-space status is claimed.
parameters.name: minimum_observed_players_per_team

primitives.purpose: Generate observed open-space candidate geometry from sampled pitch points at an anchor-relative frame.

limitations: Settled possession is a frozen duration threshold, not a judgement of possession quality.
Does not infer intent, counterattack quality, or tactical causation.
primitives.name: outcome_window

parameters.description: Maximum time after the anchor in which the settled threshold may be reached.
parameters.name: maximum_window_seconds

parameters.description: Continuous same-team active-ball possession duration required for SETTLED.
parameters.name: minimum_settled_possession_seconds

parameters.description: Optional upstream status field that must match before the window is evaluated.
parameters.name: required_anchor_status_field

parameters.description: Required upstream status value.
parameters.name: required_anchor_status_value

primitives.purpose: Evaluate whether same-team possession reaches a declared settled-duration threshold inside an anchor-relative window.

limitations: Uses provider events for action identity and nearest tracking frame for alignment.
Does not prove controlled reception, intent, optimality, or tactical role.
primitives.name: action_event_anchor

parameters.description: Provider event action type to expose as anchors.
parameters.name: action_type

primitives.purpose: Expose provider event rows as typed action anchors with frame alignment.

limitations: Provider event taxonomy supplies restart/set-piece identity; tracking supplies arrangement evidence.
PASS means a recognized restart event has enough observed outfield players for both teams at the anchor frame.
Does not infer routine variant, planned play, delivery pattern, marking assignment, player role, intent, quality, or tactical causation.
primitives.name: set_piece_structure

parameters.description: Minimum observed outfield players per team required to claim arrangement evidence.
parameters.name: minimum_observed_outfield_players

primitives.purpose: Expose recognized provider restart/set-piece events with observed attacking and defending outfield arrangement at the aligned event frame.

limitations: v0.1 supports adjacent same-team action pairs only.
Does not infer tactical intent, planned combination, or causation.
primitives.name: action_chain

parameters.description: Maximum elapsed provider event time between adjacent actions.
parameters.name: maximum_action_gap_seconds

parameters.description: Number of ordered actions in the chain. v0.1 supports adjacent pairs.
parameters.name: chain_length

primitives.purpose: Join ordered same-team action anchors into a bounded event-time action chain.

limitations: Reports observed coordinate availability only.
Does not infer tracking accuracy beyond missing/usable coordinates in v0.1.
primitives.name: tracking_quality

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where quality is evaluated.
parameters.name: frame_field

primitives.purpose: Report whether ball and declared anchor entities have usable coordinates at an anchor-relative frame.

limitations: Measures observed geometry only.
Does not infer pressure, marking quality, intent, or optimality.
primitives.name: pairwise_distance

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where distance is measured.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Anchor field containing the first entity ID.
parameters.name: entity_a_field

parameters.description: Anchor field containing the second entity ID, or ball.
parameters.name: entity_b_field

parameters.description: Threshold used for pairwise_distance_status.
parameters.name: maximum_distance_m

primitives.purpose: Measure observed distance between an anchor entity and another entity or the ball at an anchor-relative frame.

limitations: Claims only observed nearest-opposition proximity to a target player at the declared frame.
marking_status PASS means the nearest observed candidate is within the frozen distance threshold; unmarked_status PASS means the nearest observed candidate is outside it.
Does not infer marking assignment, defensive scheme, man-or-zone responsibility, role, intent, communication, causation, quality, or optimality.
Missing target tracking or insufficient observed candidate tracking produces UNKNOWN rather than a marked/unmarked claim.
primitives.name: marking

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where observed marking proximity is evaluated.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Anchor field containing the target player being checked for observed nearest-opponent proximity.
parameters.name: target_player_id_field

parameters.description: Observed outfield candidate group from which the nearest marker is selected.
parameters.name: candidate_scope

parameters.description: Nearest-opponent distance threshold for marking_status PASS.
parameters.name: maximum_marking_distance_m

parameters.description: Minimum observed outfield opponents before marked/unmarked can be claimed.
parameters.name: minimum_observed_marker_candidates

primitives.purpose: Evaluate observed nearest-opposition proximity to an anchor target player at an anchor-relative frame.

limitations: Claims only observed ball-target lane screening geometry at the declared frame.
PASS means at least one observed candidate defender lies between ball and target within the frozen lane-distance buffer.
Does not infer defender intent, tactical denial quality, pass probability, pitch-control value, marking assignment, scheme, causation, or optimality.
Missing ball/target tracking, too-short lanes, invalid thresholds, or insufficient observed defender tracking produces UNKNOWN rather than a lane-denial claim.
primitives.name: cover_shadow

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where ball-target lane screening is evaluated.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Anchor field containing the tracked target entity that defines the lane from the ball.
parameters.name: target_entity_field

parameters.description: Observed outfield candidate group checked for defender-lane screening geometry.
parameters.name: candidate_scope

parameters.description: Maximum perpendicular distance from ball-target lane for cover_shadow_status PASS.
parameters.name: maximum_lane_distance_m

parameters.description: Minimum normalized along-lane projection distance away from the ball and target endpoints.
parameters.name: minimum_projection_fraction

parameters.description: Minimum ball-target lane length before screening geometry is evaluated.
parameters.name: minimum_lane_length_m

parameters.description: Minimum observed candidate defenders before PASS/FAIL lane-screening status is claimed.
parameters.name: minimum_observed_defenders

primitives.purpose: Evaluate observed defender screening geometry on the ball-to-target lane at an anchor-relative frame.

limitations: Simple displacement-derived observed velocity only.
Does not infer effort, intent, role, or pressure quality.
Missing endpoint coordinates produce UNKNOWN.
primitives.name: velocity

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where velocity is evaluated.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Anchor-record field containing the tracked player id.
parameters.name: entity_id_field

parameters.description: Time before the evaluation frame used for displacement velocity.
parameters.name: lookback_seconds

primitives.purpose: Estimate observed entity velocity around an anchor-relative frame from tracking displacement.

limitations: Simple observed speed derivative from two displacement-derived velocity windows only.
Second derivatives amplify tracking noise; missing endpoints or implausible spikes produce UNKNOWN.
Does not infer effort, sprint quality, physical capacity, intent, role, pressure-breaking quality, or tactical causation.
Acceleration/deceleration PASS means the observed speed change exceeded frozen thresholds, not that a player deliberately burst or braked.
primitives.name: acceleration

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where acceleration is evaluated.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Anchor-record field containing the tracked player id.
parameters.name: entity_id_field

parameters.description: Length of each non-overlapping displacement-velocity window.
parameters.name: lookback_seconds

parameters.description: Minimum absolute speed change required for acceleration/deceleration PASS.
parameters.name: minimum_abs_delta_speed_mps

parameters.description: Minimum absolute acceleration magnitude required for PASS.
parameters.name: minimum_abs_acceleration_mps2

parameters.description: Frozen plausibility limit for velocity-window speeds.
parameters.name: maximum_player_speed_mps

parameters.description: Frozen plausibility limit used to mark likely tracking-noise spikes UNKNOWN.
parameters.name: maximum_abs_acceleration_mps2

primitives.purpose: Estimate observed entity speed-up and slow-down around an anchor-relative frame from two non-overlapping displacement-velocity windows.

limitations: Claims only observed endpoint-window off-ball movement by a non-ball actor in the declared candidate scope.
PASS requires clear endpoint tracking, displacement, average speed, and distance from the ball under frozen thresholds.
Does not infer run type, run purpose, decoy movement, marker dragging, space creation, role, intent, tactical causation, quality, or optimality.
Directional/path labels are separate derived claims; only explicitly modeled observed path geometry may compose on top of this base movement episode.
Insufficient candidate tracking or missing ball endpoints produce UNKNOWN rather than a fabricated run/no-run claim.
primitives.name: off_ball_run

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where the run observation window starts.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Observed outfield candidate group evaluated for off-ball movement.
parameters.name: candidate_scope

parameters.description: Forward tracking window used to measure endpoint displacement.
parameters.name: lookahead_seconds

parameters.description: Minimum endpoint displacement required for off_ball_run_status PASS.
parameters.name: minimum_run_displacement_m

parameters.description: Minimum endpoint-average speed required for off_ball_run_status PASS.
parameters.name: minimum_run_speed_mps

parameters.description: Minimum distance from the ball at both endpoints for the candidate to count as off-ball.
parameters.name: minimum_ball_distance_m

parameters.description: Minimum candidate players observed at both endpoints before PASS/FAIL can be claimed.
parameters.name: minimum_observed_candidates

parameters.description: Maximum endpoint-missing candidate ratio before the run observation is UNKNOWN.
parameters.name: maximum_missing_candidate_ratio

primitives.purpose: Detect an observed off-ball movement episode for the best same-team outfield candidate over a short anchor-relative tracking window.

limitations: Classifies only observed path geometry over an already observed off-ball run episode.
run_in_behind_status means the runner moved from not beyond to beyond the observed opposition outfield line under frozen thresholds.
diagonal_run_status means the run had both forward and lateral components under frozen thresholds.
Does not infer decoy movement, marker dragging, space creation, overlap/underlap role, third-player tactical purpose, intent, causation, quality, or optimality.
Insufficient line or tracking coverage produces UNKNOWN for line-relative labels.
primitives.name: off_ball_run_type

parameters.description: Minimum forward component for supported forward path labels.
parameters.name: minimum_forward_progression_m

parameters.description: Minimum lateral component for diagonal_run_status PASS.
parameters.name: minimum_lateral_displacement_m

parameters.description: Minimum observed opposition outfield defenders at each endpoint before run-in-behind can be evaluated.
parameters.name: minimum_observed_defenders

primitives.purpose: Classify observed off-ball run path geometry for supported literal run labels such as run-in-behind and diagonal run.

limitations: Evaluates static-point reachability under a declared straight-line speed assumption.
A reachable verdict is an optimistic point-mass bound because current heading and momentum are ignored in v0.1.
Does not infer player intent, effort, pitch control, lane denial quality, or tactical causation.
Does not solve moving-target interception or cover-shadow geometry.
Missing target or insufficient observed candidates produce UNKNOWN.
primitives.name: time_to_arrival

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where reachability is evaluated.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: How to resolve the static target point.
parameters.name: target_mode

parameters.description: Anchor field containing the target player ID when target_mode=entity.
parameters.name: target_entity_field

parameters.description: Anchor field containing target x when target_mode=fields.
parameters.name: target_x_field

parameters.description: Anchor field containing target y when target_mode=fields.
parameters.name: target_y_field

parameters.description: Observed candidate-player group evaluated for arrival.
parameters.name: candidate_scope

parameters.description: Threshold used for time_to_arrival_status.
parameters.name: maximum_arrival_seconds

parameters.description: Declared straight-line speed assumption used to estimate minimum arrival time.
parameters.name: maximum_player_speed_mps

parameters.description: Minimum observed candidate-player count required before a PASS/FAIL judgement.
parameters.name: minimum_observed_candidates

primitives.purpose: Estimate observed candidate-player time to a declared static target point at an anchor-relative frame.

limitations: Claims only observed same-player movement with the ball under a conservative control criterion.
The base primitive is direction-neutral; progressive carry is a composition over forward_progression_m.
Does not infer dribbling skill, pressure-breaking quality, player intent, tactical causation, decision quality, or optimality.
Does not claim the carry beat, bypassed, or eliminated a defender.
Loose-ball, ambiguous-control, possession-change, or missing-tracking intervals are FAIL or UNKNOWN rather than carried across.
primitives.name: carry_episode

parameters.description: Maximum interval from controlled reception to the carrier's next confirmed pass release.
parameters.name: maximum_carry_seconds

parameters.description: Minimum carrier displacement required before PASS; distinguishes carries from stationary holds.
parameters.name: minimum_displacement_m

parameters.description: Maximum ball-carrier distance used by the control criterion.
parameters.name: control_distance_m

parameters.description: Margin allowing shared teammate proximity while preserving the controlled-pass control model.
parameters.name: nearest_teammate_margin_m

parameters.description: Touch-tolerant maximum velocity-vector difference between ball and carrier for co-moving evidence.
parameters.name: maximum_ball_player_speed_delta_mps

parameters.description: Minimum observed-frame ratio satisfying the distance/nearest-player control criterion.
parameters.name: minimum_controlled_frame_ratio

parameters.description: Minimum velocity-observed-frame ratio satisfying touch-tolerant co-moving evidence.
parameters.name: minimum_comoving_frame_ratio

parameters.description: Maximum missing ball/player tracking ratio before UNKNOWN.
parameters.name: maximum_missing_frame_ratio

primitives.purpose: Identify observed same-player ball-carry intervals between a controlled reception and that player's next confirmed pass release, with conservative control continuity.

limitations: Claims only that two evidence rows joined under declared key/status/time/distinctness/same-entity constraints.
Does not infer tactical intent, causation, role semantics, optimality, or decision quality.
Preserves upstream UNKNOWN/FAIL status instead of treating missing evidence as support for a tactical claim.
N-way tactical compositions must be expressed as chains of this binary join.
primitives.name: join_episode_sets

parameters.description: Field read from each left episode to produce the join key.
parameters.name: left_key_field

parameters.description: Field read from each right episode to produce the join key.
parameters.name: right_key_field

parameters.description: Optional status field on the left episode that must equal required_status_value.
parameters.name: left_status_field

parameters.description: Optional status field on the right episode that must equal required_status_value.
parameters.name: right_status_field

parameters.description: Status value required when a left or right status field is configured.
parameters.name: required_status_value

parameters.description: Optional temporal relation between joined episodes.
parameters.name: temporal_relation

parameters.description: Left frame field used by temporal relations that compare point frames.
parameters.name: left_time_field

parameters.description: Right frame field used by temporal relations that compare point frames.
parameters.name: right_time_field

parameters.description: Maximum allowed right_time - left_time gap when temporal_relation checks order.
parameters.name: maximum_gap_seconds

parameters.description: Comma-separated entity-reference fields that must be pairwise distinct after projection.
parameters.name: distinct_entity_fields

parameters.description: Entity-reference field pair that must be equal after projection.
parameters.name: same_entity_fields

primitives.purpose: Binary reusable composition primitive that joins two episode sets by declared evidence-key fields, with optional status, temporal-order, and pairwise entity-distinctness constraints.

limitations: Uses observed outfield bounding-box width/depth only.
Does not infer tactical compactness quality, player intent, role assignment, or lane denial.
primitives.name: team_compactness

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where team compactness is evaluated.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Observed outfield team to measure.
parameters.name: player_scope

parameters.description: Maximum lateral team width for compactness PASS.
parameters.name: maximum_team_width_m

parameters.description: Maximum longitudinal team depth for compactness PASS.
parameters.name: maximum_team_depth_m

parameters.description: Minimum observed outfield players required before compactness can be evaluated.
parameters.name: minimum_observed_players

primitives.purpose: Measure observed team width/depth at an anchor-relative frame and evaluate declared compactness thresholds.

limitations: Uses observed controlled-pass endpoints only.
Does not infer a designed switch, role taxonomy, tactical causation, or pass quality.
primitives.name: switch_of_play

parameters.description: Minimum absolute y-axis displacement from release to reception.
parameters.name: minimum_lateral_displacement_m

parameters.description: Minimum absolute release y-position for the pass to start wide enough.
parameters.name: minimum_start_lateral_m

parameters.description: Minimum absolute reception y-position for the pass to end wide enough.
parameters.name: minimum_end_lateral_m

parameters.description: Maximum release-to-reception duration for a switch candidate.
parameters.name: maximum_duration_seconds

primitives.purpose: Evaluate whether a controlled pass moved the ball from one lateral side to the opposite side under declared thresholds.

limitations: Compares declared numeric evidence values only.
Does not infer why the change happened or whether it was tactically caused by the anchor event.
primitives.name: change_across_anchor

parameters.description: Before-record numeric evidence field to compare.
parameters.name: before_value_field

parameters.description: After-record numeric evidence field to compare.
parameters.name: after_value_field

parameters.description: Before-record status field that must be PASS.
parameters.name: before_status_field

parameters.description: After-record status field that must be PASS, or none to compare the numeric value without requiring after status.
parameters.name: after_status_field

parameters.description: Required before/after status value for numeric change evaluation.
parameters.name: required_status_value

parameters.description: Direction of the required numeric change.
parameters.name: change_mode

parameters.description: Minimum required change in metres.
parameters.name: minimum_change_m

parameters.description: Maximum allowed before value for compactness-style checks.
parameters.name: maximum_before_value_m

primitives.purpose: Compare before and after numeric evidence values for the same anchor under declared change thresholds.

limitations: Uses event data for candidate passes and tracking data for release/reception proof.
Does not infer tactical intention, pass optimality, or decision quality.
primitives.name: controlled_pass_episode

parameters.description: Search window before the event anchor for passer control.
parameters.name: release_search_before_seconds

parameters.description: Search window after the event anchor for ball departure.
parameters.name: release_search_after_seconds

parameters.description: Maximum release-to-controlled-reception search window.
parameters.name: reception_search_seconds

parameters.description: Maximum ball-player distance for control evidence.
parameters.name: control_distance_m

parameters.description: Margin allowing the intended player to count as controlling near teammates.
parameters.name: nearest_teammate_margin_m

parameters.description: Minimum receiver-control dwell for controlled reception.
parameters.name: minimum_receiver_dwell_seconds

parameters.description: Optional provider event-type filter for controlled-pass anchors.
parameters.name: event_type_filter

primitives.purpose: Identify completed pass actions where event data supplies the candidate passer/receiver and tracking proves physical release plus controlled reception.

limitations: Requires provider event linkage for v0.1; tracking-only redirection candidates are not modeled.
Claims only observed first-time relay under declared thresholds.
Does not infer tactical intention, third-man combination, pass optimality, or decision quality.
primitives.name: one_touch_relay_episode

parameters.description: Maximum event-time gap from input pass event to relay pass event.
parameters.name: relay_max_event_gap_seconds

parameters.description: Maximum ball-player distance for relay-touch evidence.
parameters.name: relay_touch_distance_m

parameters.description: Maximum observed relay touch-to-release duration for one-touch status.
parameters.name: maximum_relay_dwell_seconds

primitives.purpose: Identify event-linked first-time relay candidates where a completed input pass is immediately followed by an onward completed pass by the input receiver, with tracking evidence for relay touch/release.

limitations: Models only an observed geometric defensive line under declared thresholds.
Does not identify a tactical first, second, midfield, or back line.
Does not prove a line break, tactical intention, pass optimality, or defensive intent.
primitives.name: defensive_line_model

parameters.description: Minimum distance beyond the ball for a defender to count as goal-side.
parameters.name: goal_side_buffer_m

parameters.description: Maximum normalized x-span of defenders in one observed line band.
parameters.name: line_band_width_m

parameters.description: Minimum defending outfield players required to form an observed line.
parameters.name: minimum_line_defenders

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field used to evaluate the observed line.
parameters.name: anchor_frame_field

primitives.purpose: Fit an observed geometric defensive line at supplied anchor frames from defending outfield player tracking positions.

limitations: Line ranks are observed geometric ordering only, not tactical first/second/midfield/back-line labels.
Does not prove a line break, tactical intention, pass optimality, causation, or defensive role.
primitives.name: multi_line_model

parameters.description: Minimum distance beyond the ball for a defender to count as goal-side.
parameters.name: goal_side_buffer_m

parameters.description: Maximum normalized x-span of defenders in one observed line band.
parameters.name: line_band_width_m

parameters.description: Minimum defending outfield players required to form an observed line band.
parameters.name: minimum_line_defenders

parameters.description: Geometric goal-side line rank to expose for downstream relative-position tests.
parameters.name: target_line_rank

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field used to evaluate observed line bands.
parameters.name: anchor_frame_field

primitives.purpose: Fit ranked observed defensive line bands at supplied anchor frames. Rank is geometric order goal-side of the ball, not tactical role taxonomy.

limitations: Classifies only observed position relative to a supplied geometric line.
Does not identify a tactical first, second, midfield, or back line.
Does not prove a line break, tactical intention, pass optimality, or defensive intent.
primitives.name: relative_position_to_line

parameters.description: Entity-reference field read from the entity anchor record.
parameters.name: entity_id_field

parameters.description: Frame field at which the entity position is evaluated.
parameters.name: entity_frame_field

parameters.description: Distance from the line treated as level rather than ahead or behind.
parameters.name: line_buffer_m

primitives.purpose: Classify an entity position as ahead of, behind, or level with an observed line at a declared frame.

limitations: Measures receiver/relay-player position transition, not ball trajectory through a line.
Does not prove a tactical defensive-line break, causation, intention, or decision quality.
primitives.name: receiver_line_transition_during_pass_leg
primitives.purpose: Evaluate whether the relay player moved from not beyond to beyond a supplied observed line between input-pass release and relay touch.

limitations: Claims only connected event-linked receipt/relay/terminal controlled reception.
Does not infer planned combination, tactical intent, optimality, or pass probability.
primitives.name: pass_chain_episode
primitives.purpose: Join an event-linked one-touch relay to a terminal controlled reception for the relay's onward pass.

limitations: Requires a supplied observed line and exact anchor-correlated release/reception relative-position evidence.
Does not identify whether the supplied line is a first, second, midfield, or back line.
Does not infer tactical intention, pass optimality, causation, or defensive intent.
primitives.name: controlled_line_break_episode

parameters.description: Distance from the supplied line treated as level rather than ahead or behind.
parameters.name: line_buffer_m

primitives.purpose: Evaluate whether a controlled pass carried a receiver from not-yet-beyond a supplied observed line at release to beyond that same line at controlled reception.

limitations: Classifies observed outfield players only; it does not prove complete active-player lane coverage.
Uses fixed lateral lane geometry and does not infer player intention, support quality, optimality, or role semantics.
Does not prove a line break, controlled support arrival, or causal effect.
primitives.name: lane_occupancy

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field used for lane evaluation.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Observed outfield player group to classify into lanes.
parameters.name: player_scope

parameters.description: Minimum number of observed lanes that must contain at least one selected player.
parameters.name: required_occupied_lane_count

primitives.purpose: Classify observed outfield players into lateral pitch lanes at an anchor-relative frame and evaluate declared lane-count requirements.

limitations: Depends on canonical pitch coordinates and known pitch width.
primitives.name: ball_lateral_fraction
primitives.purpose: Normalize ball distance from pitch centerline toward either touchline.

limitations: Goalkeepers are excluded from the outfield centroid.
primitives.name: defensive_outfield_centroid
primitives.purpose: Measure defending outfield team centroid without goalkeeper bias.

primitives.name: signed_lateral_shift
primitives.purpose: Measure defensive centroid movement toward the ball side.

limitations: Does not infer intent, optimality, or missed opportunity.
primitives.name: outcome_classification

parameters.description: Outcome lookahead horizon in seconds.
parameters.name: horizon

primitives.purpose: Classify the post-anchor outcome under the frozen M1 predicates.

safe_generic_path.claims_boundary: Measures geometric ball entry into a relation destination region only; no pass probability, optimality, intent, causation, or missed-opportunity claim.
safe_generic_path.purpose: Agent-authorable generic composition for possession-start progressive corridors followed by ball entry into the relation destination region.

limitations: Measures entry into relation destination geometry only.
No pass probability, optimality, decision-quality, intent, causation, or missed-opportunity claim.
primitives.name: relation_destination_entry

parameters.description: Lookahead horizon for relation destination entry.
parameters.name: destination_entry_horizon_seconds

parameters.description: Seed used to derive deterministic relation-entry record IDs.
parameters.name: result_id_seed

parameters.description: Deterministic witness ordering when an anchor has multiple relation episodes.
parameters.name: episode_selection

primitives.purpose: Measure whether the ball enters the exact destination region of a relation episode inside a declared post-open window.

agent_authoring.reason: Recipe-specific wrapper; agent-authored plans must use the generic entry_status path.

limitations: Trusted recipe wrapper; agent-authored plans should use relation_destination_entry.
Requires an upstream relation episode set.
No pass probability, optimality, decision-quality, intent, or missed-opportunity claim.
primitives.name: relation_destination_entry_classification

parameters.description: Lookahead horizon for destination lane entry.
parameters.name: destination_entry_horizon_seconds

parameters.description: Seed used to derive deterministic experimental result IDs.
parameters.name: result_id_seed

parameters.description: Deterministic selection strategy when an anchor has multiple relation episodes.
parameters.name: episode_selection

primitives.purpose: Classify whether the ball later enters the destination region of a previously evaluated relation episode.

limitations: No pass probability.
No optimality or decision-quality claim.
No receiver body-orientation model.
No offside model in V1 acceptance.
relations.name: geometric_progressive_corridor

parameters.description: Maximum relation search window after the anchor.
parameters.name: max_window_seconds

parameters.description: Minimum forward progression from source to target.
parameters.name: minimum_progression_m

parameters.description: Minimum source-target segment length.
parameters.name: minimum_segment_length_m

parameters.description: Maximum source-target segment length.
parameters.name: maximum_segment_length_m

parameters.description: Minimum defender clearance from the source-target segment.
parameters.name: minimum_clearance_m

parameters.description: Frames required before a corridor is considered open.
parameters.name: open_after_frames

parameters.description: Frames required before a corridor is considered closed.
parameters.name: close_after_frames

parameters.description: Minimum open duration retained in the relation output.
parameters.name: minimum_duration_seconds

parameters.description: Retain corridors by relation destination side relative to the ball side.
parameters.name: side_filter

relations.purpose: Represent a geometrically clear forward connection from the ball location to an attacking teammate over an interval.

limitations: Counts relative ball-position change between release and controlled reception.
Does not prove the pass alone caused every opponent to be bypassed.
Goalkeepers are excluded from the opponent denominator.
relations.name: opponents_bypassed_by_action

parameters.description: Release-frame buffer for deciding whether an opponent is goal-side of the ball.
parameters.name: goal_side_buffer_m

parameters.description: Reception-frame buffer for deciding whether an opponent is behind the ball.
parameters.name: bypassed_buffer_m

relations.purpose: Count opposition outfield players who were goal-side of the ball at action release and behind the ball at controlled reception.

limitations: Observed geometric relation only; does not infer tactical intention.
Does not claim support quality, decision quality, communication, scanning, or optimality.
Uses observed outfield tracking around the declared anchor reference point.
relations.name: support_arrival_relation

parameters.description: Anchor record frame field where support timing starts.
parameters.name: anchor_frame_field

parameters.description: Observed outfield player scope for candidate supporters.
parameters.name: candidate_scope

parameters.description: Geometry used to decide whether a candidate is in the support region.
parameters.name: support_region_mode

parameters.description: Latest arrival after the support anchor frame.
parameters.name: maximum_arrival_seconds

parameters.description: Minimum continuous observed duration inside the support region.
parameters.name: minimum_duration_seconds

parameters.description: Maximum distance from the anchor reference point.
parameters.name: maximum_support_distance_m

parameters.description: Minimum number of observed candidates that must satisfy the support relation.
parameters.name: minimum_supporting_players

parameters.description: Optional upstream status field that must equal the required value before support is evaluated.
parameters.name: required_anchor_status_field

parameters.description: Required upstream status value when required_anchor_status_field is not none.
parameters.name: required_anchor_status_value

relations.purpose: Evaluate whether observed candidate teammates enter a declared geometric support region around an anchor reference point within a declared time window and duration.

limitations: Observed geometric/kinematic pressure only.
Does not infer pressure quality, defensive intent, scanning, decision quality, or causation.
Missing carrier or defender tracking produces UNKNOWN rather than false pressure.
relations.name: pressure_on_carrier

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where pressure is evaluated.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Anchor-record field containing the pressured carrier id.
parameters.name: carrier_id_field

parameters.description: Nearest-defender distance required for observed pressure.
parameters.name: maximum_pressure_distance_m

parameters.description: Minimum defender-to-carrier closing speed in metres per second.
parameters.name: minimum_closing_speed_mps

parameters.description: Maximum angle between defender velocity and defender-to-carrier vector.
parameters.name: maximum_approach_angle_degrees

parameters.description: Minimum observed duration satisfying the pressure condition ending at the evaluation frame.
parameters.name: minimum_pressure_duration_seconds

parameters.description: Velocity lookback interval for closing-speed and approach-angle estimates.
parameters.name: lookback_seconds

parameters.description: Candidate defender scope. v0.1 supports observed defending outfield players.
parameters.name: candidate_scope

relations.purpose: Evaluate observed nearest-defender pressure on an anchor carrier using distance, closing speed, approach angle, duration/window, and tracking coverage.

limitations: Claims only observed multi-defender pressure geometry around a carrier at the declared frame.
PASS means multiple observed defenders satisfy frozen distance, closing/approach, and angular-spread thresholds.
Does not infer press trap, pressing trigger, coordinated scheme, defensive communication, intent, causation, pressure quality, or optimality.
Missing carrier tracking, insufficient defender tracking, or missing kinematic evidence produces UNKNOWN rather than a team-press claim.
relations.name: team_press

parameters.description: Anchor-record frame field where multi-defender pressure is evaluated.
parameters.name: frame_field

parameters.description: Anchor-record field containing the pressured carrier id.
parameters.name: carrier_id_field

parameters.name: maximum_press_distance_m

parameters.description: Minimum defender-to-carrier closing speed for a pressure actor.
parameters.name: minimum_closing_speed_mps

parameters.description: Maximum angle between defender velocity and defender-to-carrier vector.
parameters.name: maximum_approach_angle_degrees

parameters.description: Minimum observed defenders satisfying pressure actor criteria.
parameters.name: minimum_pressing_defenders

parameters.description: Minimum angular separation among pressure actors around the carrier.
parameters.name: minimum_angle_spread_degrees

parameters.description: Minimum observed defending outfield players before PASS/FAIL team-press status is claimed.
parameters.name: minimum_observed_defenders

parameters.description: Velocity lookback interval for closing-speed and approach-angle estimates.
parameters.name: lookback_seconds

parameters.description: Candidate defender scope. v0.1 supports observed defending outfield players.
parameters.name: candidate_scope

relations.purpose: Evaluate observed multi-defender pressure geometry around an anchor carrier using defender distance, closing speed, approach angle, and angular spread.

limitations: Observed geometric local count only; does not infer pressure or tactical role.

parameters.description: Maximum observed defending players inside the local region.

relations.purpose: Evaluate observed perspective-versus-defending local player counts inside a declared radius around an anchor reference point.

limitations: No pass probability.

No player intent, causation, or missed-opportunity claim.

eq.name: eq
eq.purpose: Compare a signal to an equal typed value.

rejected_sources: generic collection counts not indexed by anchor_id

required_safety_rules: Use relation_destination_entry.entry_status with eq PASS for destination-region entry.
Do not invent operators or catalog refs.
Do not use relation_destination_entry_classification in agent-authored plans.

tools.description: Search approved and experimental recipe summaries without exposing files or raw data.
tools.name: search_recipes

tools.description: Describe one exposed tool, primitive, relation, operator, or generated typed-plan authoring contract.
tools.name: describe_capability

tools.description: Store a typed query document and return an opaque draft_plan_id.

tools.description: Bind and boundary-check a submitted typed query plan.
tools.name: validate_query_plan

tools.description: Execute a validated plan through the deterministic runtime.

tools.description: Return predicate traces and requested evidence for a result.

tools.name: inspect_non_match

tools.description: Materialize a bounded coordinate replay JSON artifact.
